summary: The lock namespace contract is synchronized, but the changed lock_artifact output surface is not asserted despite the Spec and Test Plan claiming human/JSON evidence.
inspection_summary: The implementation and real Git regression prove repository isolation, but contention tests only assert the error code and do not verify the common-dir lock path in human and JSON CLI output.
inspection_evidence: node --test test/guarded-run-session.test.js: 42/42 pass; current-head affected-surface evidence: 55/55 pass
judgment_delta: code/docs contract is aligned, but path_surface_coverage is incomplete because user-visible lock_artifact rendering is unverified

findings.detail: Assert details.lock_artifact and human/JSON runCli rendering for the Git common-directory lock path.
